title: Transcribe visible text from the attached...

messages.content: Transcribe visible text from the attached image(s) verbatim. Do not interpret.

This not only creates a model  
that reasons through its own  
reasoning but also requires  
the user to adjust + transform  
their own output so  
that the UM can understand  
human semiotics + lexeme.
